film.title: Overboard
film.overview: A spoiled, wealthy yacht owner is thrown overboard and becomes the target of revenge from his mistreated employee.

dialogues.dialogue: No, I just... I need to tell you somethin'. Here, sit down.  What is it?  Annie, I've done... I've done something that, um... I'm ashamed of. And I just... - I already know. - You do?  - I already know. - You do?  - What... What do you know? - You work nights at the fertiliser plant.
dialogues.cause_raw: working nights at the fertiliser plant

dialogues.dialogue: - I already know. - You do?  - What... What do you know? - You work nights at the fertiliser plant.  You don't have to be ashamed because you shovel fish guts.  I'm proud of you no matter what you do.  - Is that it? - Uh, well, that's one of the things, but I... No. Not really.

And poof! The kid puked up the fry  and they named you Burger Boy employee of the month.  It was great. They put your picture above the cash register and... I was really proud of you. I mean it.  I was really proud of you. I mean it.  You can be quite charming when you wanna be.
